name: Prawns New Orleans
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Large prawns, raw or cooked
8 oz Chopped Italian Style tomatoes, fresh or tinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean, peel, and chop into quarter-inch dice the peppers, onion, and okra.
2. Heat the oil in a large pan and fry the garlic with the onion, peppers, and okra for about five minutes.
3. Add the tomatoes and cook gently for about 25 minutes, stirring occasionally until you have a nice bright sauce. It looks lovely as it is full of different colors.
4. Season generously with allspice, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
5. Add the prawns. If they are raw, cook for seven minutes. If they are already cooked and pink, give them just three minutes to heat through; otherwise, you will end up with a pound of rubber!
6. Stir so the prawns are covered in the sauce. Sprinkle with a little parsley and serve immediately with lots of boiled rice.
